summary: V68.4 Phase D Terminal Signals + Solfeggio Tone Testing. Backend: 100% pass - Resonant Frequency quest end-to-end verified (3 signals in order, quest_complete=true, reward_sparks=1000, reward_card=tesseract_key). Frontend: Pages load correctly, QuestTerminalTrigger correctly NOT rendering (prior steps not done), solfeggioTone.js exports verified.

minor.issue: Quest reward cards (tesseract_key) stored in DB but not returned in API response. API only returns threshold-based cards. The tesseract_key has threshold 7500 but is awarded at 2398 sparks via quest completion.

integration_issues.issue: Shows error boundary 'A dimensional rift appeared' - likely due to 401 auth errors in browser session. Page requires authenticated user.

action_items: MINOR: Update /api/sparks/wallet and /api/universe/state to merge threshold-based cards with quest-reward cards from wallet.cards_earned array
VERIFY: Dream Realms page error boundary - may need to check if ProgressGate or auth flow is causing the issue
critical_code_review_comments: solfeggioTone.js correctly exports playSolfeggio(528Hz) and playQuestCompleteChord() using Web Audio API
QuestTerminalTrigger.js correctly uses SIGNAL_TO_STEP map to only render when prior steps are done
ActiveMissionHUD.js correctly imports and calls playQuestCompleteChord() on quest_complete toast
Backend quests.py correctly enforces ordered step completion and awards reward_card on quest completion

success_rate.frontend: 85% (pages load, QuestTerminalTrigger logic correct, Dream Realms has error boundary issue)

seed_data_creation: User was reset to sparks=1398, 1 card (starseed_initiate), zero quest progress before testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V68.4 Phase D adds QuestTerminalTrigger component to Tesseract, Dream Realms, and Observatory pages. The trigger only renders when the quest's prior steps are all completed. Backend quest auto_detect enforces ordered step completion. Test user now has sparks=2398, cards=starseed_initiate+celestial_navigator (threshold-based), tesseract_key (quest reward - stored but not returned in API). Resonant Frequency quest is completed.
